name: Lemony Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cooked asparagus in a shallow greased casserole dish in a single layer.
2. Melt the butter until it is golden brown.
3. Blend the mayonnaise, salt, white pepper, dry mustard, and lemon juice into the melted butter.
4. Pour the mixture over the asparagus.
5. Sprinkle bread crumbs and grated parmesan cheese evenly over the top.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 15 minutes or until browned. The dish can be prepared in advance and reheated when ready to serve. Yield: 4-6 servings.
